steps.title: Identify the substitution signal
steps.content: The key signal is the pairing of “avoid using the term 'life'” with “researchers should use another word: 'lyfe.'” The sentence structure creates a before-and-after instruction.

steps.title: Apply the transition word
steps.content: ”Instead” directly marks when one action replaces another. The other choices mark time (Previously), express concession (Regardless), or function as a locative adverb (There), none fitting the substitution dynamic. That matches choice D — D is correct.
